title: Ocean Microplastic Muncher
prompt: Design a microbe that eats ocean microplastics and turns them into biodegradable plastic
impact: Over 14 million tons of plastic end up in the ocean every year. Engineered microbes could break down polyethylene into PHA bioplastic.

title: Carbon Capture Cyanobacteria
prompt: Design a cyanobacterium that captures CO2 from the atmosphere 10x faster than natural photosynthesis
impact: Enhanced carbon fixation could help offset industrial emissions while producing useful biomass.

title: Drought-Proof Soil Microbe
prompt: Design a soil bacterium that helps plants retain water during drought conditions
impact: Drought affects 55 million people annually. Soil microbes that enhance plant water retention could save crops and lives.

title: Gut Inflammation Fighter
prompt: Design a probiotic bacterium that detects and reduces gut inflammation markers
impact: IBD affects 6.8 million people globally. Smart probiotics could provide targeted, continuous therapy.

title: Oil Spill Remediation Bug
prompt: Design a marine bacterium that breaks down crude oil into harmless byproducts after an oil spill
impact: Oil spills devastate marine ecosystems for decades. Engineered bioremediation could accelerate recovery from years to months.

title: Self-Fertilizing Crop Helper
prompt: Design a root-associated bacterium that fixes atmospheric nitrogen for cereal crops like corn and wheat
impact: Synthetic fertilizer production causes 1.4% of global CO2 emissions. Biological nitrogen fixation could replace chemical fertilizers.

title: Forever Chemical Destroyer
prompt: Design an enzyme or microbe that breaks down PFAS (forever chemicals) in contaminated groundwater
impact: PFAS contamination affects drinking water for 200+ million Americans. No natural organism efficiently degrades these persistent chemicals.

title: Algae Biofuel Factory
prompt: Design an algae strain that produces high-yield biodiesel from sunlight and wastewater
impact: Algae biofuels could replace petroleum diesel with a carbon-neutral alternative grown on non-arable land.

title: Novel Antibiotic Producer
prompt: Design a soil bacterium that produces a novel class of antibiotic effective against MRSA
impact: Antibiotic-resistant infections kill 1.27 million people per year. New antibiotic classes are desperately needed.

title: Livestock Methane Reducer
prompt: Design a gut microbe for cattle that reduces methane emissions from digestion by 50%
impact: Livestock methane accounts for 14.5% of global greenhouse gas emissions. A probiotic solution could transform the industry.

title: Bio-Dye Factory
prompt: Design a microbe that produces vibrant textile dyes from sugar, replacing toxic chemical dyes
impact: Textile dyeing pollutes 20% of global wastewater. Microbial dyes offer a non-toxic, renewable alternative.

title: Coral Reef Protector
prompt: Design a symbiotic microbe that helps coral resist bleaching from rising ocean temperatures
impact: Half of the world's coral reefs have died since 1950. Heat-tolerant symbionts could buy reefs time to adapt.

title: PET Bottle Recycler
prompt: Design an enzyme that breaks down PET plastic bottles into reusable monomers at room temperature
impact: Only 9% of plastic is recycled. Enzymatic recycling could make plastic truly circular.

title: Heavy Metal Sponge
prompt: Design a bacterium that absorbs lead and arsenic from contaminated drinking water
impact: 240 million people are exposed to arsenic-contaminated water. Biofilters could provide affordable purification.

title: Spider Silk Brewery
prompt: Design a yeast strain that produces spider silk protein for sustainable high-strength textiles
impact: Spider silk is 5x stronger than steel by weight. Microbial production could replace petroleum-based synthetic fibers.

title: Food Waste Valorizer
prompt: Design a microbe that converts food waste into animal feed protein
impact: 1/3 of all food produced is wasted. Converting it to protein could feed millions while reducing landfill methane.

title: Rare Earth Miner Microbe
prompt: Design a bacterium that extracts rare earth elements from electronic waste for recycling
impact: Rare earth mining devastates ecosystems. Biomining from e-waste could provide critical materials sustainably.

title: Acne-Fighting Skin Probiotic
prompt: Design a skin-surface probiotic that outcompetes acne-causing bacteria and produces anti-inflammatory compounds
impact: Acne affects 85% of teenagers. Probiotic treatments could replace antibiotics and harsh chemicals.

title: Self-Healing Concrete Microbe
prompt: Design a spore-forming bacterium that can be mixed into concrete to heal cracks by producing calcium carbonate
impact: Concrete repair costs $100B+ annually. Self-healing concrete could dramatically extend infrastructure lifespan.

title: Shelf-Stable Vaccine Factory
prompt: Design a probiotic bacterium that produces and delivers vaccine antigens orally, no refrigeration needed
impact: Cold chain requirements prevent vaccines from reaching 20M children annually. Oral biologics could change that.
